title: Bottleneck and genetic diversity loss
short_desc: A large population crashes to 10 survivors. Genetic diversity collapses.

commentary.headline: Running: bottleneck at gen 10 (300 → 10 → 300)
commentary.observe: Heterozygosity (H_obs in the stats box) drops sharply at generation 10 and does NOT recover on its own. Watch for alleles that go to fixation by chance during the bottleneck.
